items.title: Final: Sixers 100, Pacers 93 in OT. Philon with 24 points. Broome with 23 and 11. Summer Sixers are 2-0.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt: Final: Sixers 100, Pacers 93 in OT. Philon with 24 points. Broome with 23 and 11. Summer Sixers are 2-0.

items.title: Sixers close the half strong and the Pacers do not. Sixers up 59-45 at the break. Pacers 13 of 30 from the floor, 4 of 15 from 3, 8 of 11 at the line. Sixers 22 of 40, 5 of 15, 5 of 8. Jalen Slawson eight points. Johnni Broome 17, Matt Rogers 14, Labaron Philon 13 for Philly.
items.author: Dustin Dopirak
items.body_excerpt: Sixers close the half strong and the Pacers do not. Sixers up 59-45 at the break. Pacers 13 of 30 from the floor, 4 of 15 from 3, 8 of 11 at the line. Sixers 22 of 40, 5 of 15, 5 of 8. Jalen Slawson eight points. Johnni Broome 17, Matt Rogers 14, Labaron Philon 13 for Philly.

items.title: Halftime: Sixers 59, Pacers 45. Broome with 17 and 7. Philon with 13 points and 2 assists. Another strong effort from the guys the Sixers want to see thrive in this environment.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt: Halftime: Sixers 59, Pacers 45. Broome with 17 and 7. Philon with 13 points and 2 assists. Another strong effort from the guys the Sixers want to see thrive in this environment.

items.title: Nick Nurse reiterated today that he plans to have Labaron Philon in the rotation immediately.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Nick Nurse reiterated today that he plans to have Labaron Philon in the rotation immediately. 

"I think he’s going this direction [up] quickly. And I think he’s got some confidence to him that I don’t think he’ll be afraid. I think he’ll make the most of the opportunity."

items.title: Isaac Johnson with high praise for  Philon today:
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Isaac Johnson with high praise for  Philon today:

“He might be the steal in the draft, I’m not gonna lie. Too many teams let him slip. For him to fall here? He is incredible. How quick he is. How tight his handle is. How he’s able to shoot the ball. Down the lane. His passing instincts…”

Labaron Philon Jr. on the conversations he's had with the Sixers since the draft as far as first steps and initial objectives: 

"Draft night, it was definitely a special night but just moving on past that, talking with the staff and everybody around the program... 1/

items.title: Labaron Philon has mentioned adaptability as a trait he takes pride in multiple times since being drafted by the Sixers. Feels useful while joining the Maxey/Edgecombe backcourt.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Labaron Philon has mentioned adaptability as a trait he takes pride in multiple times since being drafted by the Sixers. Feels useful while joining the Maxey/Edgecombe backcourt. 

"Being able to keeping playing that way and not changing now, I feel like is really important."

items.title: Philon, on fitting into the Sixers' defensive scheme: "Get steals and being able to pressure the ball at the point of attack. To be a guard in the NBA, you have to be able to play both sides...You have to be locked in, especially at the next level."
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt: Philon, on fitting into the Sixers' defensive scheme: "Get steals and being able to pressure the ball at the point of attack. To be a guard in the NBA, you have to be able to play both sides...You have to be locked in, especially at the next level."

items.title: Labaron Philon, on returning for his sophomore season: "It was very important for me to go back, work on the shooting, and being able to play both on and off ball...That's one of my biggest traits, being able to adapt and do both."
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon, on returning for his sophomore season: "It was very important for me to go back, work on the shooting, and being able to play both on and off ball...That's one of my biggest traits, being able to adapt and do both."

items.title: Labaron Philon’s draft day began with an early-morning music session. He stayed focused on “the main thing” as others were picked. He was still moving through Barclays Center after midnight.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Labaron Philon’s draft day began with an early-morning music session. He stayed focused on “the main thing” as others were picked. He was still moving through Barclays Center after midnight.

It was all worth the wait.

“Being able to hear your name is everything.” 

www.inquirer.com/sixers/2026-...

media.title: Inside Labaron Philon Jr.’s draft night and unexpected fall to the ‘perfect spot’ with the Sixers
media.description: Philon delayed his draft night a year after originally declaring in 2025, then waited longer than expected to be selected by the Sixers at No. 22. But he believes it was worth the wait.

media.title: Sixers tap 'dynamic' Labaron Philon Jr. as newest member of young nucleus: 'He's going to fit Philly'
media.description: Labaron Philon Jr., the No. 22 overall pick in the 2026 NBA Draft, said it was "destined" that he landed with the Sixers.

items.title: Thanks for following along with tonight’s coverage of the first round of the 2026 NBA Draft. More to come tomorrow on the Sixers’ selection of Labaron Philon Jr. at No. 22 overall and potential second-round activity.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Thanks for following along with tonight’s coverage of the first round of the 2026 NBA Draft. More to come tomorrow on the Sixers’ selection of Labaron Philon Jr. at No. 22 overall and potential second-round activity.

items.title: Nick Nurse says "the talent is there" with Labaron Philon Jr., and it was "too much talent to not take in that position."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Nick Nurse says "the talent is there" with Labaron Philon Jr., and it was "too much talent to not take in that position."

items.title: Nick Nurse said he believes Labaron Philon is talented enough to play right away. Nurse said he "would never rule out" going to three-guard looks, but guys will have to guard up and rebound.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Nick Nurse said he believes Labaron Philon is talented enough to play right away. Nurse said he "would never rule out" going to three-guard looks, but guys will have to guard up and rebound.

items.title: Nurse doesn't rule out 3-guard looks but thinks Philon will see opportunities both on the ball and off the ball.
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt:
Nurse doesn't rule out 3-guard looks but thinks Philon will see opportunities both on the ball and off the ball.

Says one of the keys to the 3 guards playing together will be guarding up + banging with bigger matchups and then rebounding.

items.title: Nick Nurse: "[Philon's] obviously somebody that we feel can play right away. I think he's talented enough to do that. I see him playing both of those [guard] positions."
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt:
Nick Nurse: "[Philon's] obviously somebody that we feel can play right away. I think he's talented enough to do that. I see him playing both of those [guard] positions."

"I never would rule out going three guards to see what that looks like."

items.title: Nick Nurse is not sure about three-guard lineups with Labaron Philon Jr., Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe, but thinks Philon can play right away and can play both guard positions.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Nick Nurse is not sure about three-guard lineups with Labaron Philon Jr., Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe, but thinks Philon can play right away and can play both guard positions.

items.title: Nick Nurse calls Labaron Philon Jr. an "exciting" player who can play like Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Mentioned Philon's deep range and pick-and-roll chops.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Nick Nurse calls Labaron Philon Jr. an "exciting" player who can play like Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Mentioned Philon's deep range and pick-and-roll chops.

items.title: Nick Nurse, in Philon: "Played in a system at Alabama that's really pro style....I think that'll serve him well. I think he's certainly got two-way capability. I think he can guard."
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt: Nick Nurse, in Philon: "Played in a system at Alabama that's really pro style....I think that'll serve him well. I think he's certainly got two-way capability. I think he can guard."

items.title: Nick Nurse on the Labaron Philon Jr. pick: "My initial thoughts are he is a really talented scorer, really fast and explosive and can really get it in the bucket."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Nick Nurse on the Labaron Philon Jr. pick: "My initial thoughts are he is a really talented scorer, really fast and explosive and can really get it in the bucket."

Nurse highlights Philon's swagger and confidence and said he played in a "pro-style" offense at Alabama.

items.title: Mike Gansey, asked if Labaron Philon Jr. being picked with the asset the Sixers acquired for Jared McCain for No. 22, says he was not here when the trade was made but "I hope [Philon is] good" and someone that people "like as much as Jared."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey, asked if Labaron Philon Jr. being picked with the asset the Sixers acquired for Jared McCain for No. 22, says he was not here when the trade was made but "I hope [Philon is] good" and someone that people "like as much as Jared."

items.title: Gansey says the drafting of Philon does not change the team's plans for Quentin Grimes. Says the org has been in contact with both his and Kelly Oubre's representatives.
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt: Gansey says the drafting of Philon does not change the team's plans for Quentin Grimes. Says the org has been in contact with both his and Kelly Oubre's representatives.

items.title: Gansey, on Philon: "The edge, the swag that he plays with, the people in Philly are going to like that."
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt: Gansey, on Philon: "The edge, the swag that he plays with, the people in Philly are going to like that."

items.title: Mike Gansey said he's "hopeful" to bring back Quentin Grimes and Kelly Oubre, but isn't sure how it will play out. Said Labaron Philon's presence doesn't change that.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey said he's "hopeful" to bring back Quentin Grimes and Kelly Oubre, but isn't sure how it will play out. Said Labaron Philon's presence doesn't change that.

items.title: Mike Gansey mentioned wanting to get Tyrese Maxey off the ball more often and believes the Labaron Philon Jr. pick will help in that effort.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey mentioned wanting to get Tyrese Maxey off the ball more often and believes the Labaron Philon Jr. pick will help in that effort.

items.title: Asked Mike Gansey if the Labaron Philon Jr. pick will impact Quentin Grimes' upcoming free agency:
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Asked Mike Gansey if the Labaron Philon Jr. pick will impact Quentin Grimes' upcoming free agency:

"This doesn't change it."

Gansey says "hopefully" the Sixers bring back Grimes and Kelly Oubre Jr., adding the team has been in contract with both of their representatives.

items.title: Mike Gansey says Labaron Philon Jr. can learn from VJ Edgecombe on defense.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey says Labaron Philon Jr. can learn from VJ Edgecombe on defense.

Said as a freshman, Philon picked up full-court, showed good instincts, toughness, hands, physicality, competitiveness. "He'll try to hold his own. The hope is he can be average to above-average."

items.title: Mike Gansey said he doesn't anticipate too many three-guard looks, but he expects Labaron Philon to have a big role. Mentioned his ability to play on and off ball, his shot improvement. Also believes his defense will be better like it was his freshman year.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey said he doesn't anticipate too many three-guard looks, but he expects Labaron Philon to have a big role. Mentioned his ability to play on and off ball, his shot improvement. Also believes his defense will be better like it was his freshman year.

items.title: "The Sixers got better with Labaron [Philon Jr.]," Mike Gansey said. Up next: the second round. Gansey said the Sixers will "maybe" try to go and get someone after shuffling their board before turning their attention to free agency.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: "The Sixers got better with Labaron [Philon Jr.]," Mike Gansey said. Up next: the second round. Gansey said the Sixers will "maybe" try to go and get someone after shuffling their board before turning their attention to free agency.

items.title: Mike Gansey liked the Sixers' range at No. 22 before knowing Labaron Philon – "a lot higher" on their board – would fall. "I think this is a really deep draft, at least in the top 20-ish."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey liked the Sixers' range at No. 22 before knowing Labaron Philon – "a lot higher" on their board – would fall. "I think this is a really deep draft, at least in the top 20-ish."

"There's so many good guards in this draft," Gansey said, that he expected one to fall.

items.title: Mike Gansey highlighted Labaron Philon's efficiency and turnover avoidance as a high-usage, high-minute guard at Alabama playing against a very challenging slate of opponents.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey highlighted Labaron Philon's efficiency and turnover avoidance as a high-usage, high-minute guard at Alabama playing against a very challenging slate of opponents.

items.title: Gansey, on the Philon/Maxey backcourt: "I think he can play with Tyrese a little bit. He's on the slighter side, but if you look back at his freshman season, he can guard."
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt: Gansey, on the Philon/Maxey backcourt: "I think he can play with Tyrese a little bit. He's on the slighter side, but if you look back at his freshman season, he can guard."

items.title: Mike Gansey says Nick Nurse thinks "at times" Labaron Philon Jr. could play with Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey says Nick Nurse thinks "at times" Labaron Philon Jr. could play with Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe.

"I don't see a lot of minutes, but maybe in certain situations I can."

items.title: Gansey, on Philon: "You need as many guards as you can that can create a shot."
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt:
Gansey, on Philon: "You need as many guards as you can that can create a shot." 

"In the playoffs in the halfcourt, you gotta go get a bucket, and I think Labaron can go get one whenever he wants."

items.title: Gansey says the Sixers need help at every position. He describes Philon as having been atop their board at 22 and higher than that.
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt: Gansey says the Sixers need help at every position. He describes Philon as having been atop their board at 22 and higher than that.

items.title: Mike Gansey says the Labaron Philon Jr. pick "helps" Nick Nurse, citing the massive workloads shouldered by Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe last year. Says Philon needs to put on weight but "really guarded."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey says the Labaron Philon Jr. pick "helps" Nick Nurse, citing the massive workloads shouldered by Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe last year. Says Philon needs to put on weight but "really guarded."

"I know it's in him... he's competitive."

"We can't have enough guards."

items.title: Mike Gansey said the Sixers need help at every position, so he believes Labaron Philon is a fit at guard. References the workload of Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe last season.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey said the Sixers need help at every position, so he believes Labaron Philon is a fit at guard. References the workload of Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe last season.

items.title: Gansey on Philon: ""He was the highest guy on the board at 22. We had him higher than that."
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt:
Gansey on Philon: ""He was the highest guy on the board at 22. We had him higher than that."

"If you look at our roster, we need help at every position, 1-5."

"He's a guard, so now we have to focus on other areas."

items.title: Mike Gansey says the Labaron Philon Jr. pick was a combination of fit vs. best player available. He was their highest-ranked player, much higher than No. 22 overall.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey says the Labaron Philon Jr. pick was a combination of fit vs. best player available. He was their highest-ranked player, much higher than No. 22 overall.

"We need help at every position," Gansey said. "One through five."

items.title: Mike Gansey says Labaron Philon Jr. will learn from Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey says Labaron Philon Jr. will learn from Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe.

"He's a hooper. He just finds a way."

Talked about a game against Tennessee in which Philon took over down the stretch. Mentioned he played through injuries this season.

items.title: Mike Gansey on Labaron Philon: "Dynamic. Can score. Can pass. I think he was the only player in Division 1 to average 22, 5 assists and shoot over 50% from the field.
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey on Labaron Philon: "Dynamic. Can score. Can pass. I think he was the only player in Division 1 to average 22, 5 assists and shoot over 50% from the field. 

"He's the focal point of their offense. I think he's going to fit Philly. He's not afraid.:"

items.title: Mike Gansey on Labaron Philon: "He's got some toughness. He fits Philly. He plays with an edge, plays with a swag."
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey on Labaron Philon: "He's got some toughness. He fits Philly. He plays with an edge, plays with a swag."

items.title: Mike Gansey thinks Labaron Philon Jr.'s toughness, edge, loyalty and swag will make him a good fit in Philadelphia.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey thinks Labaron Philon Jr.'s toughness, edge, loyalty and swag will make him a good fit in Philadelphia.

"We were very very excited he was there."

items.title: Asked Mike Gansey why Labaron Philon Jr. was the Sixers' pick at No. 22 overall:
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Asked Mike Gansey why Labaron Philon Jr. was the Sixers' pick at No. 22 overall:

"He was pretty high on our board... Surprised a bit he was there."

Says he is close friends with Alabama's athletic trainer. Says Philon can play on and off the ball. Called him "dynamic."

items.title: Mike Gansey says the Sixers were surprised Labaron Philon was on the board when they were picking. Describes him as "dynamic", can play on and off ball, score and pass.
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey says the Sixers were surprised Labaron Philon was on the board when they were picking. Describes him as "dynamic", can play on and off ball, score and pass.

items.title: Meet Labaron Philon, the 76ers First Round Pick of 2026 NBA Draft
items.author: NBA.com
items.body_excerpt: Meet Labaron Philon, the 76ers First Round Pick of 2026 NBA Draft NBA.com

items.title: Labaron Philon with a lot of praise for Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Said he studied Maxey's game and played against Edgecombe in high school. Believes the three of them can form a great gift.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon with a lot of praise for Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Said he studied Maxey's game and played against Edgecombe in high school. Believes the three of them can form a great gift.

items.title: Labaron Philon Jr. knows Philadelphia fans are passionate and is excited to be part of it. It's going to get "better and better," he said. He wants to help the Sixers become "a better organization."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon Jr. knows Philadelphia fans are passionate and is excited to be part of it. It's going to get "better and better," he said. He wants to help the Sixers become "a better organization."

items.title: Labaron Philon Jr. says he feels he has developed as a ball-handler and aims to get stronger in order to guard 1-3 or 1-4. He says he wants to "sharpen all his skills and stay level-headed" after mentioning his ball-handling package.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Labaron Philon Jr. says he feels he has developed as a ball-handler and aims to get stronger in order to guard 1-3 or 1-4. He says he wants to "sharpen all his skills and stay level-headed" after mentioning his ball-handling package.

"Some people call it a bag."

items.title: Labaron Philon Jr. has never been to Philadelphia. "I've heard they've got great cheesesteaks."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Labaron Philon Jr. has never been to Philadelphia. "I've heard they've got great cheesesteaks."

Says he knows and has played against VJ Edgecombe in high school and has loved watching him "go out there and kill" in the NBA. Said Edgecombe was great on "all levels."

items.title: Labaron Philon Jr. says he studied Tyrese Maxey because of Maxey's ability to create his own shot, selflessness and fearlessness taking tough shots. "At the guard spot, that's really what you need: someone that's going to be a great leader." Mentioned Maxey welcoming VJ Edgecombe
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon Jr. says he studied Tyrese Maxey because of Maxey's ability to create his own shot, selflessness and fearlessness taking tough shots. "At the guard spot, that's really what you need: someone that's going to be a great leader." Mentioned Maxey welcoming VJ Edgecombe.

items.title: Labaron Philon said he's learned how to play on and off ball during his two seasons at Alabama. Said his job will be to take pressure off Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Said it's "special" to play with a talented roster.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon said he's learned how to play on and off ball during his two seasons at Alabama. Said his job will be to take pressure off Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Said it's "special" to play with a talented roster.

items.title: Labaron Philon Jr. on his fit with Tyrese Maxey + VJ Edgecombe: "Just making the game easier on them, being able to take the pressure off [them]... I would just say with Joel and all the other guys... it's special."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Labaron Philon Jr. on his fit with Tyrese Maxey + VJ Edgecombe: "Just making the game easier on them, being able to take the pressure off [them]... I would just say with Joel and all the other guys... it's special."

Philon says he doesn't prefer playing on or off the ball.

items.title: Labaron Philon says that he connected with Jameer Nelson at the combine, and knew the Sixers were itnerested. Calls it destiny to play with Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe, saying that he can fit in well with the pace that they play, and that he can play both on, and off, ball.
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon says that he connected with Jameer Nelson at the combine, and knew the Sixers were itnerested. Calls it destiny to play with Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe, saying that he can fit in well with the pace that they play, and that he can play both on, and off, ball.

items.title: Asked Labaron Philon Jr. if he had pre-draft contact with the Sixers + what stands out to him about his fit. Said he talked to Jameer Nelson + others at the combine this year & talked to them last year. Said he wants to play fast-paced basketball with Tyrese Maxey + VJ Edgecombe.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Asked Labaron Philon Jr. if he had pre-draft contact with the Sixers + what stands out to him about his fit. Said he talked to Jameer Nelson + others at the combine this year & talked to them last year. Said he wants to play fast-paced basketball with Tyrese Maxey + VJ Edgecombe.

items.title: Labaron Philon says he talked to Jameer Nelson and connected with the Sixers at the draft combine. Seems excited about playing with Maxey and Edgecombe.
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon says he talked to Jameer Nelson and connected with the Sixers at the draft combine. Seems excited about playing with Maxey and Edgecombe.

The 2026 NBA Draft is LIVE on ABC & ESPN.

items.title: Sixers add offensive firepower, draft guard Labaron Philon Jr. with 22nd pick
items.author: NBC Sports Philadelphia
items.body_excerpt: Sixers add offensive firepower, draft guard Labaron Philon Jr. with 22nd pick NBC Sports Philadelphia Labaron Philon Jr. to 76ers, Watch Highlights of No. 22 Pick in 2026 NBA Draft Bleacher Report 76ers may have completely flipped a disastrous narrative overnight The Sixer Sense

items.title: Labaron Philon just represented way too good a value to pass up. He should be able to step in as the Sixers' first guard off the bench right away -- much needed to give NBA minutes leader Tyrese Maxey some relief.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon just represented way too good a value to pass up. He should be able to step in as the Sixers' first guard off the bench right away -- much needed to give NBA minutes leader Tyrese Maxey some relief.

items.title: In a panel of draft experts yesterday, Bobby Marks, Jay Bilas and Fran Fraschilla all highlighted Philon as a potential later-first sleeper.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
In a panel of draft experts yesterday, Bobby Marks, Jay Bilas and Fran Fraschilla all highlighted Philon as a potential later-first sleeper. 

Bilas commended Philon taking feedback after declaring last year to improve, and Fraschilla said Philon might wind up as the best PG in this draft.

items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon nearly doubled his 3p volume from his freshman to sophomore seasons at Alabama and went from a 31.5% 3p shooter to a 39.9% 3p shooter.
